data.title: Naniiro no Nani
data.synopsis: Short anime based on band Kuusou Iinkai's songs and written by the vocalist Ryuuichi Miura. The theme song is also done by Kuusou Iinkai.

titles.title: Golden Kamuy: Barato no Youjinbou/Kaiki! Nazo no Kyodai Tori
Golden Kamuy OAD: Showdown in Barato
ゴールデンカムイ 茨戸の用心棒 / 怪奇! 謎の巨大鳥
Golden Kamuy: The Bodyguards of Barato/Terror! The Mysterious Giant Bird

data.title: Golden Kamuy: Barato no Youjinbou/Kaiki! Nazo no Kyodai Tori
data.title_english: Golden Kamuy: The Bodyguards of Barato/Terror! The Mysterious Giant Bird
data.title_japanese: ゴールデンカムイ 茨戸の用心棒 / 怪奇! 謎の巨大鳥
title_synonyms: Golden Kamuy OAD: Showdown in Barato
data.synopsis:
The 7th Division's Private Hyakunosuke Ogata and former Shinsengumi Vice Commander Toshizou Hijikata find themselves on opposite sides of a gang war in Barato after hearing rumors of the Hidoro gang possessing an escaped prisoner's tattooed skin. With a lead to the hidden Ainu gold close at hand, the two gladly take up arms but a betrayal will force both sides to think twice before carelessly jumping the gun.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Golden Kamuy OVA is an original animation bundled with the 15th volume of the Golden Kamuy manga. The animation takes place during the events of the final episode of season one, but follows Hyakunosuke Ogata and Toshizou Hijikata.

titles.title: スーパードラゴンボールヒーローズ

data.title: Super Dragon Ball Heroes
data.title_japanese: スーパードラゴンボールヒーローズ
data.synopsis: In May 2018, V-Jump announced the promotional anime for Dragon Ball Heroes, a Japanese arcade and trading card game. The video game has been adapted to a Nintendo Switch port for western audiences, whilst the card game is released under the name "Dragon Ball Super TCG" and is combined with the other card game of the same name in japan. The anime is expected to be short and it is not expected to broadcast on TV. It has adapted the game's Prison Planet Arc, as long as the manga original arc "Big Bang Mission" and "Ultra God Misson", also fully detailed in the Heroes manga published in Saikyou Jump, although under 2 separate canons. They have never been published officially in English. The first episode debuted July 1, 2018 at Aeon Lake Town.
data.background: Episodes 1-50 featured 2D animation made by Toei Animation. For Episodes 51-56, the 2D animation was replaced with full 3DCGI animation by Dimps, using in-game models and assets from Super Dragon Ball Heroes arcade game.

titles.title: Wo Shi Jiang Xiaobai: Shijie Shang de Ling Yige Wo
我是江小白 世界上的另一个我

data.title: Wo Shi Jiang Xiaobai (2018)
data.title_japanese: 我是江小白 世界上的另一个我
title_synonyms: Wo Shi Jiang Xiaobai: Shijie Shang de Ling Yige Wo
data.synopsis:
Jiang Xiaobai has regained his memories, and Tong Li cannot bring herself to face him. Separately, they confront the truths left unsaid for 10 years—about the band September, to which Jiang Xiaobai and Mu Xiyu dedicated their youth; about the love triangle between Jiang Xiaobai, Mu Xiyu, and Tong Li; and about the painful circumstances that brought the trio together and ultimately led to the terrible tragedy that occurred on the day Tong Li left for America. At the end of it all, can Jiang Xiaobai and Tong Li accept the past and face the future together?

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Huan Jie Wang
data.synopsis: In the world where most of the humans of the Eudemon continent have power of Eudemon (spiritual power), the protagonist is born without spiritual power, his dream is to be the next king of Eudemon. But without having any spiritual power can you fulfill your dream? On a day before the Tian Wu exam, he crosses a spy from the Mo Wu side that was defeated in the great war of 10 years ago. This girl infiltrates the forces of Tian Wu and thus the protagonist was involved in the middle of the fight between the forces Tian Wu and Mo Wu.

data.title: Tian Yu
data.synopsis:
A millennium ago, the Five Monarchs guarded the land of the Xia Dynasty with magical artifacts. Later, the leader of the Dragon Clan, Zu Long, assisted humanity by establishing the Yun Chui Empire. The Empire faces the Tranquil Ocean where the Xi and Black Water Clans have defended it throughout a peaceful millennium. Now, the waves are surging from below and chaos will rise once again.

 (Source: Mooncakes Team)

titles.title: 推しが武道館いってくれたら死ぬ
If My Favorite Pop Idol Made It to the Budokan, I Would Die

data.title: Oshi ga Budoukan Ittekuretara Shinu
data.title_english: If My Favorite Pop Idol Made It to the Budokan, I Would Die
data.title_japanese: 推しが武道館いってくれたら死ぬ
data.synopsis:
After receiving a flyer from Maina Ichii—a member of the idol group ChamJam—and seeing her perform at a local concert, Eripiyo falls in love with Maina and decides to devote her life to supporting the shy and reserved rising star. Eripiyo's charismatic presence and iconic red tracksuit soon give her recognition as Maina's one and only unrivaled fan. 

Whether it be a performance or a small fan gathering in the middle of nowhere, Eripiyo is guaranteed to be at every event Maina participates in. Not even an injury or Maina's seemingly cold attitude toward her can stop Eripiyo from pursuing her dream of seeing her beloved idol perform at the world-famous arena Budoukan.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Oshi ga Budoukan Ittekuretara Shinu was released on Blu-ray in two volumes from March 18, 2020 to April 15, 2020; and on DVD in six volumes from March 18, 2020 to May 20, 2020. Alongside utilizing traditional methods of music production, the series also uses music produced with film scoring, a technique commonly used in movies to create music that accompanies specific scenes to accentuate particular elements.

titles.title: 知ったかぶりカイツブリ

data.title: Shittakaburi Kaitsuburi
data.title_japanese: 知ったかぶりカイツブリ
data.synopsis:
A Shiga prefecture promotional anime for Lake Biwa. The Lake Biwa Otsu Prince Hotel has a mascot called Prince Nio (named after the hotel 'Prince' and 'Nio' after the port the hotel is located on). 

The mascot was also used for a local news program, real estate commercials, cheering on the local schools' sport events, and other promotional needs for the region under Biwako Broadcasting and Fujigumi's copyright stake in the mascot.

They released a series of family-friendly sing-a-long CDs and animated music video DVDs.

data.title: Shigutsman
data.synopsis: A Shiga prefecture promotional anime. It stars a superhero named Shigutsman, a portmanteau of "shiga" prefecture, "guts," and "man" who lives in Shiga prefecture with other superheroes. Because there is so much peace, the superheroes don't have much to do besides go to community center meetings.

titles.title: Yamishibai: Japanese Ghost Stories Sixth Season

data.title: Yami Shibai 6
title_synonyms: Yamishibai: Japanese Ghost Stories Sixth Season
data.synopsis:
Late at night, in a clearing within a dark fog-filled forest, there sits a kamishibai storyboard. A visitor approaches, and suddenly, the fog recedes. A shape begins to take form beside the board—this figure is the masked Storyteller, who once again starts to spin tales of horror and despair.

The events described in these macabre tales might happen to anyone, even your neighbors or friends: a group of girls bully one of their members in a cave, only to find themselves the victims of a dark presence; a boy with scopophobia moves to the countryside, but he still cannot escape the eyes of others; a man has a window that won't stay closed, and is the recipient of strange phone calls; and a salaryman steals an umbrella on a rainy day, but this seemingly insignificant act leads to consequences he never expected. Visitors may enjoy the Storyteller's offerings, but they should also be vigilant so that they don't wind up as the subjects of his next story.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Godzilla 3: Hoshi wo Kuu Mono
data.synopsis:
With the defeat of the Bilusaludo's nanometal city, the destruction of humanity seems inevitable. Worse yet, Captain Haruo Sakaki's refusal to sacrifice his humanity has come under fire from the remaining Bilusaludo troops, who blame him for their defeat. In their darkest moment, the few surviving humans turn to the religion of the Exifs, which promises that devotion is the path to salvation from Godzilla.

However, the Exif are not what they seem. As the survivors become more and more zealous in their devotion, Sasaki wonders what exactly the priest Metphies is hiding—especially regarding his relationship with the monster known as Ghidorah.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: ONE PIECE エピソードオブ空島

data.title: One Piece: Episode of Sorajima
data.title_japanese: ONE PIECE エピソードオブ空島
data.synopsis:
The Straw Hats embark on a dangerous trip to the sky where their destination comes straight out of a fairytale. The island of Skypiea and its grand city of gold await among the clouds, but a clash of winged clans and a man who calls himself God won’t make things easy! Only Luffy can resist this God’s mighty power and light the mysteries of the past.

(Source: Funimation)

data.title: Meshinuma.
data.synopsis:
Iinuma, a somewhat dull salaryman, eats food as his craving drives him! This is an appetite-stimulating gourmet manga where you can just watch him eating his food!

(Source: Tokuma Shoten, translated)

data.title: Gaikan Chiba
data.synopsis: Promotional anime for Tokyo Outer Ring Road (GAIKAN).

titles.title: Senjou no Valkyria Fake Movie Promo
戦場のヴァルキュリア Valkyria Chronicles

data.title: Senjou no Valkyria Special
data.title_japanese: 戦場のヴァルキュリア Valkyria Chronicles
title_synonyms: Senjou no Valkyria Fake Movie Promo
data.synopsis: Fake movie promo video. Included in the DVD volume 9.

titles.title: Code:Realize - Sousei no Himegimi - Set a Thief to Catch a Thief
Code:Realize ~Guardian of Rebirth~ Set a thief to catch a thief

data.title: Code:Realize - Sousei no Himegimi - Set a Thief to Catch a Thief
data.title_english: Code:Realize ~Guardian of Rebirth~ Set a thief to catch a thief
data.synopsis:
It has been a month since London was struck with tragedy, and a ceremony symbolizing peace and restoration will soon be held. In light of these events, Arsène Lupin plans to throw a party for Cardia Beckford to honor the fulfillment of her wish. Lupin sets out on a search for the perfect gift to offer her; however, he finds himself caught up in the theft of a valuable jewel, and he is framed and believed to be the culprit. With Lupin locked behind bars, his friends work along with Cardia and an unexpected ally to clear Lupin's name and find the real perpetrators behind the heist. 

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

data.title: Chikyuugai Shounen Shoujo
data.synopsis:
In the year 2045, Internet and artificial intelligence have become widespread in the outer space. Following a massive accident at a space station, a group of children are left behind. Using narrowband and SNS, low intelligence AI, and smartphone-controlled drones, they overcome numerous crises.

(Source: MAL News)

titles.title: The Laws of the Universe: Part 1

data.title: Uchuu no Hou: Reimei-hen
data.title_english: The Laws of the Universe: Part 1
data.synopsis:
University students, Ray, Anna, Tyler, Halle, and Eisuke are enjoying college life and pursuing their dreams, but in reality, They have a secret mission, to fight against invading Reptilians from outer space. One day, Ray travels back in time to 330 million years ago on Earth, to find his missing friend Tyler who has fallen into a trap set by the evil alien, Dahar. During that time, Alpha, the God of the Earth, was planning to create a new civilization on Earth and invited Queen Zamza and her fellow Reptilian from the planet Zeta, to Earth.

What is the intention of Dahar? What will happen to Ray and Tyler?

And what is “the plan of the God of the Earth"?

(Source: Eleven Arts)

titles.title: Uma Musume: Pretty Derby - BNW no Chikai
ウマ娘 プリティーダービー BNWの誓い

data.title: Uma Musume: Pretty Derby - BNW no Chikai
data.title_japanese: ウマ娘 プリティーダービー BNWの誓い
data.synopsis:
While Team Spica's horse girls have accumulated countless victories and raised their popularity, the popular trio known as BNW has been struggling to produce results lately. Consisting of Biwa Hayahide, Narita Taishin, and Winning Ticket, the trio is well-known for their camaraderie during their fierce races, but recently something has distanced them from each other.

When Tracen Academy plans to set up a relay race with each of the BNW members leading a team against each other as part of their fan festival, Team Spica's is saddled with the job to convince the team leaders to participate. Although recruiting each of them proves difficult, Team Spica's horse girls are determined to make sure the trio mends their relationship and that the race will be remembered for years to come.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]
data.background: Uma Musume: Pretty Derby - BNW no Chikai was bundled with the fourth Blu-ray volume of Uma Musume: Pretty Derby.

titles.title: How clumsy you are, Miss Ueno.
How clumsy you are, Miss Ueno.
How Clumsy You Are, Miss Ueno.
How Clumsy You Are, Miss Ueno.

data.title: Ueno-san wa Bukiyou
data.title_english: How clumsy you are, Miss Ueno.
data.synopsis:
As the head of her middle school's science club, it's only fitting that Ueno is also a brilliant inventor. With devices that can convert any liquid into drinkable water, deodorize the most foul smells, or even generate dark matter to be used as a means of concealment, it seems like nothing is beyond Ueno's capabilities. However, she doesn't invent these devices for the advancement of mankind. Rather, the one force that motivates her is love, the only phenomenon she can't quite figure out.

Ueno is head over heels for Tanaka, her nonchalant fellow club member. Yet, because she is too nervous to confess her love and he is too oblivious to notice her affection, her love life is completely stagnant. In Ueno's mind, if she could just expose him to perverted situations, then surely he'd get flustered and fall for her, right? Assisted by her stone-faced classmate and dedicated wingwoman Yamashita, Ueno employs her many inventions on Tanaka in a lewd manner in hopes that he may one day understand how she feels.

[Written by MAL Rewrite]

titles.title: 社外秘 リライフ研究所 サポート課

data.title: ReLIFE: Kanketsu-hen Specials
data.title_japanese: 社外秘 リライフ研究所 サポート課
data.synopsis: Two specials of ReLIFE: Kanketsu-hen released on mobile and later included on Blu-ray/DVD volume.
data.background: The specials were first released on the Japanese home video release of the ReLIFE Final Arc. In November 2018, they were released on the home video release in North America.

KADO: The Right Answer – Beyond Information
